src: A compact succulent plant with fleshy, elongated leaves, soft green with frosty white dusting, arranged in a rosette shape. It is in a small, glossy black faceted pot with light brown pebbles.
edit: A toy plant knitted from yarn, with stripes of lime green and lavender. It has textured leaves resembling a succulent, placed in a small black pot with a faceted geometric design.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: the object is centered on a textured concrete surface with scattered dried pine needles, illuminated naturally, against a soft-focus tree background.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is on a large, intricately designed green leaf-shaped tray, indoors with gentle lighting highlights.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is on a narrow bluish-grey ledge, overlooking a parking lot filled with cars. The background has blurred branches and distant buildings, with ample daylight.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object is on a bluish-grey ledge, with tree-filled surroundings and distant rooftops, sunlight casting shadows.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object is on a white windowsill with a paper clip, outside view of tree branches and a partially visible building through a double window pane.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object is centered on a weathered stone surface with vibrant autumn leaves. The background has trees with orange, red, and yellow foliage. Warm, golden lighting casts soft shadows.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: An object rests on a broad, ornately sculpted tray shaped like a leaf, in earthy orange with hints of deep red. Soft indoor lighting adds glowing highlights, enhancing the setting in autumn style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: an object rests on a russet-brown ledge, overlooking a parking lot with vehicles. Blurred branches with orange and red leaves are around, with distant buildings like a watercolor background, in ample daylight casting a golden hue.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object is on a ledge with russet and gold hues, surrounded by trees with orange, red, and yellow leaves. Distant rooftops are beneath trees shedding foliage. Sunlight casts shadows in a crisp, golden autumn landscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object rests on a leaf-strewn windowsill with an oak leaves and paper clip. Outside, bare tree branches against an autumn sky, and a building visible through a streaked window pane.
